subject: Ratification request: packet-first /graph review workflow
body: P0 accepted and P2 delivered. Please review and ratify the packet-first graph review workflow using the following files as the canonical review surface: docs/AGENT_WEB_REVIEW_BRIEF.md, data/graph-analysis-packets.json, data/website-section-index.json, data/graph-packet-schema.json, docs/GRAPH_PACKET_AGENT_DEPLOYMENT.md, docs/agent-handoffs/CURRENT_STATE_SUMMARY.md. Focus on status taxonomy, acceptance language, accepted_fix criteria, and whether packet-first review should be the canonical default. Do not require raw graph JSON unless explicitly escalated.
